title: Sales Tax Act 1990 (Finance Act 2025 Updates)
description: Comprehensive MCQ test on Pakistan's Sales Tax Act 1990, updated to align with Finance Act 2025 amendments.

questions.text: When was the first Sales Tax Act introduced in Pakistan?
What major transformation did the Sales Tax Act, 1990 introduce?
Who ultimately bears the entire tax burden in Pakistan's sales tax system?
Which Finance Act introduced the e-commerce taxation framework and enhanced digital compliance?
What is the fundamental nature of the sales tax system in Pakistan?
Under Section 2(1A), failing to file a sales tax return for how many consecutive periods affects Active Taxpayer status?
What is the annual turnover threshold for a Cottage Industry as per Finance Act 2025?
Which condition is NOT required for Cottage Industry exemption?
To whom does the concept of Input Tax fundamentally apply?
What does Input Tax under Section 2(14) include?
options: Tax on supply, import, provincial service tax, and AJK tax

questions.text: What is the current standard sales tax rate effective after Finance(Supplementary) Act, 2023?
Who fixes the Retail Price for Third Schedule items under Section 2(27)?
What does 'Supply' under Section 2(33) explicitly include?
options: Private use of manufactured goods for non-taxable purposes

questions.text: Which of the following is excluded from Taxable Activity under Section 2(35)?
How is the Time of Supply determined under Section 2(44)?
options: Earlier of goods delivery or payment receipt

questions.text: What does the Value of Supply generally exclude?
How is the value of supply determined for installment sales to consumers under the 2025 update?
What does the term 'CREST' refer to in the 2025 definitions?
What does 'e-Bilty' mean under Section 2(9B)?
options: Digital transport document from Cargo Tracking System

questions.text: Who qualifies as a 'Courier' under the 2025 definition?
options: Entities delivering goods & collecting cash, including ride-hailing

questions.text: When is Further Tax under Section 3(1A) applicable?
options: Sale to unregistered person or non-active taxpayer

questions.text: What is the current rate of Further Tax as per Finance Act 2025?
Can Further Tax be adjusted against Input Tax?
How is sales tax collected on Third Schedule items?
options: At first stage by manufacturer on retail price

questions.text: What does Zero Rating under Section 4 mean?
options: Exempt supply with no input claim

questions.text: What happens to Input Tax for zero-rated supplies?
Which of the following is NOT a zero-rated supply category?
What is the consequence of supplying exempt goods under Section 13?
options: No output tax charged, input tax is wasted

questions.text: How are exports of exempt manufactured goods treated?
What is the treatment for in-house consumption if the final product is exempt?
What must be legibly printed on packages of Third Schedule goods?
What does the 2025 update allow the Board to do regarding Third Schedule goods?
What is the base for calculating Further Tax?
Which entities are explicitly added as triggers for Further Tax in 2025?
What is the formula for determining tax liability under Section 7?
What is the time limit for claiming Input Tax?
options: Relevant period or six succeeding tax periods

questions.text: Under Section 8C, input tax is disallowed if the supplier has not done what?
What is the 90% Rule under Section 8B?
options: Input adjustment limited to 90% of output tax

questions.text: What is the minimum tax payable under the 90% rule?
Which of the following is an exception to the 90% input tax restriction?
What is the standard time limit for issuing debit/credit notes under Section 9?
Who issues a Credit Note?
What is the banking channel threshold under Section 73?
What is the penalty for non-compliance with Section 73 banking channel requirements?
How is residual input tax apportioned?
When is the final annual adjustment for apportioned input tax performed?
What is the 2025 update regarding input tax adjustment limits?
options: Board may use automated risk management to defer/fix limits

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT mandatorily required to register for sales tax?
What is the 2025 requirement for e-commerce registration?
options: All persons selling digitally ordered goods from Pakistan must register

questions.text: Who is responsible for not allowing unregistered persons to use e-commerce platforms?
What is the deadline for suppliers to declare sales in Annexure C?
What is the deadline for buyers to pick/accept invoices in Annexure A?
What is the final return filing deadline under Section 26?
What is the penalty for filing a sales tax return beyond 10 days of the due date?
What is required for filing a revised return under Section 26?
options: Commissioner's approval (unless within 60 days & higher tax/lower refund)

questions.text: Under Section 21, what triggers suspension of registration?
options: Non-availability, non-filing for 6 months, or abnormal profiles

questions.text: How long can a suspended person contest status before invoices are rejected for input?
What is the record-keeping requirement under Section 22?
What new requirement was added for invoices in 2025?
options: Linkage with e-Bilty for transported goods

questions.text: Which retailers must integrate with the Board's system for real-time reporting?
What is the voluntary deposit incentive if paid before an audit notice?
Who has the primary authority to pass assessment orders under Section 11?
Under Section 32, can delegated officers further delegate their powers?
What triggers a Best Judgment Assessment under Section 11D?
options: Failure to file return upon notice or produce records

questions.text: How can a Section 11D assessment be abated?
options: File return within 60 days + pay tax, surcharge, penalty

questions.text: What is the limitation period for issuing a show cause notice under Section 11G?
options: 5 years from end of financial year

questions.text: What is the maximum total period for order issuance under Section 11G?
What is the penalty for non-filing of return by an e-commerce platform for 2 consecutive months?
What is the penalty for enabling unregistered sellers on an e-commerce platform?
What is the punishment for tax fraud under Section 2(37)?
options: Imprisonment up to 5 years + tax loss + 100% penalty + surcharge

questions.text: What is the default surcharge rate for general defaults under Section 34?
What is the default surcharge rate for tax fraud cases?
Under Section 37A, who may initiate an inquiry into tax fraud?
options: Officer not below AC with Commissioner approval

questions.text: What is the maximum period to complete an inquiry under Section 37A?
What committee authorizes an arrest warrant for tax fraud?
What is the condition for arrest authorization under Section 37A regarding fraud amount?
What happens to corporate directors/officers in case of company tax fraud?
options: Personally responsible and may be arrested

questions.text: What is the time limit to appeal to the Commissioner (Appeals) under Section 45B?
What is the new 2025 appeal option introduced in Section 45B?
options: Direct appeal to Appellate Tribunal without first going to Commissioner

questions.text: What is the maximum period for Commissioner (Appeals) to decide an appeal?
What is the time limit for appealing to the Appellate Tribunal under Section 46?
What type of questions can be referred to the High Court under Section 47?
What is the minimum tax liability threshold for ADR eligibility?
Which entities are mandatorily required to apply for ADR regardless of amount?
What percentage of tax due must be paid to grant an automatic stay during an appeal under Section 48?
What is the maximum extension period the Board or Commissioner can condone under Section 74?
What authority handles extraordinary condonation for significant exchequer loss?
What is the tax treatment for Tier 1 retailers under updated rules?
options: Normal registration OR 2% of turnover without input adjustment + mandatory system integration

questions.text: How is Tier 2 retailer tax collected?
options: Via electricity bills as final discharge

questions.text: What is the additional tax rate on electricity bills up to Rs. 20,000 for Tier 2 retailers?
What is the standard sales tax rate on services in Balochistan under the 2015 Act?
How are separate offices of a company in and outside Balochistan treated for service tax?
What is the principle of reverse charge for services imported into Balochistan?
options: Recipient pays tax to Balochistan Government

questions.text: What is the tax rate for telecommunication services in Balochistan?
Under Balochistan's Third Schedule, what is the tax rate for restaurants with POS/e-invoicing compliance?
What is the penalty for non-compliance with Section 56AB data sharing for the first default?
What does 'Whistleblower' refer to under Section 2(46A)?
options: Person reporting tax fraud or evasion per Section 72D

questions.text: What is the consequence of 'Licensed Integrator' non-compliance?
options: Rs. 1 million OR 1% of suppressed sales value (higher)

questions.text: What is the penalty for e-Bilty non-compliance or tampering?
Which entities must provide real-time database access under Section 56AB?
options: NADRA, FIA, land authorities, excise, utility companies
